---
title: "Harita"
page-layout: full
twitter-card:
  title: "Harita — Narin Güran davası"
  description: "Tavşantepe köyü ve çevresindeki olay konumları, kameralar ve izlenen yollar."
  image: https://narineneoldu.github.io/resources/images/map-card.png
  card-style: summary_large_image
  site: "@narineneoldu"
  creator: "@narineneoldu"
open-graph:
  title: "Harita — Narin Güran davası"
  description: "Tavşantepe köyü ve çevresindeki olay konumları, kameralar ve izlenen yollar."
  image: https://narineneoldu.github.io/resources/images/map-card.png
  locale: tr_TR
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
      <link rel="stylesheet" href="/resources/css/site-map.css" />
---

```{=html}
<div class="media-block media-block-map">
<div class="plyr-wrapper">
<div id="site-map"></div>
</div>
</div>

<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet-rotate@0.2.8/dist/leaflet-rotate-src.js"></script>
<script>
(function() {
  const points = [
    { lat: 37.853272, lon: 40.201844, title: 'Hacı Sait Tek kamerası', description: '', category: 'camera', minZoom: 13, fov: { angle: 90, bearing: 160, radius: 1900 } },
    { lat: 37.836825, lon: 40.200689, title: 'Okul ana kapı kamerası', description: '', category: 'camera', minZoom: 15, fov: { angle: 60, bearing: 210, radius: 30 } },
    { lat: 37.836795, lon: 40.200522, title: 'Okul yan yol kamerası', description: '', category: 'camera', minZoom: 15, fov: { angle: 60, bearing: 160, radius: 30 } },
    { lat: 37.833632, lon: 40.207827, title: 'DARAN-2 kamerası', description: '', category: 'camera', minZoom: 13, fov: { angle: 100, bearing: 255, radius: 800 } },
    { lat: 37.8242075313078, lon: 40.18931092328323, title: 'Ruhi Kaya kamerası', description: '', category: 'camera', minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.836392, lon: 40.199694, title: "Arif Güran'ın (Narin'in) evi", description: '', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.836222, lon: 40.200393, title: "Nevzat Bahtiyar'ın evi", description: '', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.836162, lon: 40.200588, title: "Nevzat'ın annesinin evi", description: '', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.836259, lon: 40.200541, title: "Nevzat'ın ahırı", description: '', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.835643, lon: 40.200317, title: "Kur'an kursu", description: '', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.8344959268991, lon: 40.201050784196994, title: "Erhan Güran'ın evi", description: '', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.83609005616541, lon: 40.19981278362367, title: "Arif Güran'ın ahırı", description: '', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.837018, lon: 40.200037, title: "Maşallah Güran'ın evi", description: '', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.836522, lon: 40.199248, title: "Salim Güran'ın evi", description: '', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.83708876712442, lon: 40.19829347332967, title: "Hediye Güran'ın evi", description: '', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.837999628902516, lon: 40.19739225110051, title: "Barış Güran'ın evi", description: '', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.83490794885681, lon: 40.20023002823764, title: 'Bakkal', description: '', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.835035050279835, lon: 40.20004763802401, title: "Şevket Kaya'nın evi", description: '', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.8361196402061, lon: 40.20084157189342, title: "Arif Güran'ın annesi (üvey)", description: 'Narin\'in üvey babannesi.', category: 'building', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.836364, lon: 40.200442, title: 'Patlıcan alanı', description: 'Nevzat Bahtiyar\'ın patlıcan suladığını iddia ettiği yer.', category: 'site', minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.837992, lon: 40.201579, title: "Narin'in mezarı", description: 'Narin Güran\'ın mezarının bulunduğu yer.', category: 'site', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.847978, lon: 40.204864, title: 'Cenazenin bulunduğu yer', description: 'Narin Güran\'ın cenazesinin bulunduğu yer.', category: 'site' },
    { lat: 37.83491066931177, lon: 40.20189417782052, title: 'Yangın çıkan yer', description: '', category: 'site', minZoom: 15 },
    { lat: 37.8433096603824, lon: 40.2268839189327, title: 'Kırmızı terliğin bulunduğu yer', description: 'Bu terliğin Narin\'e ait olmadığı anlaşıldı ve kolluk terliği bulan kişilerin \'kolluğu yanıltmak için terliği oraya koyduğunu\' öne sürerek haklarında tutanak tuttu ve bu konudan dolayı yargılandılar.', category: 'site', minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.83089164436593, lon: 40.193505257790676, title: 'Mısır tarlası (yukarı)', description: '', category: 'site', minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.8384010533975, lon: 40.20514317042196, title: 'Mısır tarlası (aşağı)', description: '', category: 'site', minZoom: 13 }
  ];

  // Dev modu: production domain'i dışında (localhost, preview vb.) aktif
  const isDev = !window.location.hostname.includes('narineneoldu.github.io');

  const makeIcon = (color) => L.icon({
    iconUrl: '/resources/images/markers/marker-icon-2x-' + color + '.png',
    shadowUrl: '/resources/images/markers/marker-shadow.png',
    iconSize: [25, 41],
    iconAnchor: [12, 41],
    popupAnchor: [1, -34],
    tooltipAnchor: [16, -28],
    shadowSize: [41, 41]
  });

  const categoryIcons = {
    camera: makeIcon('green'),
    building: makeIcon('blue'),
    site: makeIcon('orange')
  };

  const map = L.map('site-map', {
    maxZoom: 22,
    rotate: true,
    bearing: 0,
    touchRotate: true,
    shiftKeyRotate: true,
    rotateControl: { closeOnZeroBearing: false }
  });

  // "Diyarbakır" gibi büyük etiketler için yüksek z-index'li pane
  map.createPane('topLabels');
  map.getPane('topLabels').style.zIndex = 650;

  // Zoom-bazlı görünürlük tracking (hem marker'lar hem etiketler için)
  const zoomTracked = [];

  const bing = L.tileLayer('https://ecn.t{s}.tiles.virtualearth.net/tiles/a{q}.jpeg?g=1', {
    attribution: '© Microsoft Bing Maps',
    subdomains: ['0', '1', '2', '3'],
    maxNativeZoom: 19,
    maxZoom: 22
  });
  bing.getTileUrl = function(coords) {
    let q = '';
    for (let i = coords.z; i > 0; i--) {
      let d = 0;
      const m = 1 << (i - 1);
      if (coords.x & m) d++;
      if (coords.y & m) d += 2;
      q += d;
    }
    const s = this.options.subdomains[Math.abs(coords.x + coords.y) % 4];
    return 'https://ecn.t' + s + '.tiles.virtualearth.net/tiles/a' + q + '.jpeg?g=1';
  };

  const esri = L.tileLayer(
    'https://server.arcgisonline.com/ArcGIS/rest/services/World_Imagery/MapServer/tile/{z}/{y}/{x}',
    {
      attribution: 'Tiles © Esri, Maxar, Earthstar Geographics',
      maxNativeZoom: 17,
      maxZoom: 22
    }
  );

  const osm = L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', {
    attribution: '© OpenStreetMap',
    maxNativeZoom: 19,
    maxZoom: 22
  });

  bing.addTo(map);

  let bingErrorCount = 0;
  bing.on('tileerror', function() {
    bingErrorCount++;
    if (bingErrorCount > 20 && map.hasLayer(bing)) {
      map.removeLayer(bing);
      esri.addTo(map);
      console.warn('Bing tile servisi yanıt vermiyor, Esri\'ye geçildi.');
    }
  });

  const toDMS = (d, axis) => {
    const dir = axis === 'lat' ? (d >= 0 ? 'K' : 'G') : (d >= 0 ? 'D' : 'B');
    const a = Math.abs(d);
    const deg = Math.floor(a);
    const min = Math.floor((a - deg) * 60);
    const sec = ((a - deg) * 3600 - min * 60).toFixed(2);
    return deg + '°' + min + "'" + sec + '"' + dir;
  };

  const categoryLayers = {
    camera: L.layerGroup(),
    building: L.layerGroup(),
    site: L.layerGroup()
  };

  // Great-circle destination — bearing yönünde dist metre uzaklıktaki nokta
  const destinationPoint = (lat, lon, bearingDeg, distMeters) => {
    const R = 6371000;
    const d = distMeters / R;
    const t = bearingDeg * Math.PI / 180;
    const f1 = lat * Math.PI / 180;
    const l1 = lon * Math.PI / 180;
    const f2 = Math.asin(Math.sin(f1) * Math.cos(d) + Math.cos(f1) * Math.sin(d) * Math.cos(t));
    const l2 = l1 + Math.atan2(
      Math.sin(t) * Math.sin(d) * Math.cos(f1),
      Math.cos(d) - Math.sin(f1) * Math.sin(f2)
    );
    return [f2 * 180 / Math.PI, l2 * 180 / Math.PI];
  };

  // Kameranın görüş alanı polygon'u + radius değer etiketi (pasta dilimi)
  const buildFovPolygon = (lat, lon, fov) => {
    const pts = [[lat, lon]];
    const half = fov.angle / 2;
    const steps = 48;
    for (let i = 0; i <= steps; i++) {
      const b = fov.bearing - half + (i / steps) * fov.angle;
      pts.push(destinationPoint(lat, lon, b, fov.radius));
    }
    const polygon = L.polygon(pts, {
      color: '#81c784',
      weight: 1.5,
      fillColor: '#81c784',
      fillOpacity: 0.35,
      interactive: false
    });

    // Radius değer etiketi: sağ kenarın hafif içinde (3° ofset), çizgiye paralel
    const edgeBearing = fov.bearing + fov.angle / 2;
    const labelPos = destinationPoint(lat, lon, edgeBearing - 3, fov.radius * 0.6);
    let rot = ((edgeBearing - 90) % 360 + 360) % 360;
    if (rot > 90 && rot < 270) rot = (rot + 180) % 360;
    if (rot > 180) rot -= 360;
    const label = L.marker(labelPos, {
      icon: L.divIcon({
        className: 'site-map-fov-radius-label',
        html: '<span style="display:inline-block;transform:rotate(' + rot + 'deg)">' + fov.radius + 'm</span>',
        iconSize: [80, 20],
        iconAnchor: [40, 10]
      }),
      interactive: false,
      keyboard: false
    });

    return L.featureGroup([polygon, label]);
  };

  points.forEach(p => {
    const coords = toDMS(p.lat, 'lat') + ', ' + toDMS(p.lon, 'lon');
    const marker = L.marker([p.lat, p.lon], { icon: categoryIcons[p.category] })
      .bindTooltip(p.title)
      .bindPopup('<b>' + p.title + '</b>' + p.description + '<span class="coords">' + coords + '</span>');
    categoryLayers[p.category].addLayer(marker);
    zoomTracked.push({ marker, minZoom: p.minZoom ?? 0, maxZoom: p.maxZoom ?? 22 });

    if (p.fov) {
      const fovPoly = buildFovPolygon(p.lat, p.lon, p.fov);
      marker.on('popupopen', () => fovPoly.addTo(map));
      marker.on('popupclose', () => map.removeLayer(fovPoly));
    }

    // Popup açıkken hover-tooltip'i gizle, popup kapanınca tekrar etkinleştir
    marker.on('popupopen', () => marker.closeTooltip());
  });

  // Sulama kanalı — köy ve çevresinden geçen kıvrımlı su yolu
  const canalControlPoints = [
    [37.840048, 40.189501],
    [37.840000, 40.190243],
    [37.839929, 40.190791],
    [37.839859, 40.191194],
    [37.839760, 40.191765],
    [37.839678, 40.192313],
    [37.839593, 40.192748],
    [37.839498, 40.193257],
    [37.839404, 40.193489],
    [37.839342, 40.193613],
    [37.839233, 40.193758],
    [37.839056, 40.193917],
    [37.838910, 40.194041],
    [37.838772, 40.194159],
    [37.838683, 40.194255],
    [37.838606, 40.194353],
    [37.838537, 40.194470],
    [37.838467, 40.194635],
    [37.838427, 40.194788],
    [37.838375, 40.195002],
    [37.838320, 40.195217],
    [37.838261, 40.195439],
    [37.838218, 40.195621],
    [37.838185, 40.195744],
    [37.838139, 40.195863],
    [37.838074, 40.195987],
    [37.837901, 40.196263],
    [37.837793, 40.196440],
    [37.837638, 40.196679],
    [37.837404, 40.197038],
    [37.837177, 40.197385],
    [37.837082, 40.197505],
    [37.837004, 40.197581],
    [37.836866, 40.197688],
    [37.836736, 40.197766],
    [37.836620, 40.197808],
    [37.836502, 40.197843],
    [37.836344, 40.197859],
    [37.836259, 40.197855],
    [37.836195, 40.197847],
    [37.836065, 40.197819],
    [37.835935, 40.197770],
    [37.835795, 40.197697],
    [37.835721, 40.197644],
    [37.835661, 40.197593],
    [37.835576, 40.197522],
    [37.835500, 40.197462],
    [37.835413, 40.197406],
    [37.835328, 40.197365],
    [37.835256, 40.197344],
    [37.835181, 40.197329],
    [37.835101, 40.197321],
    [37.835018, 40.197326],
    [37.832790, 40.197560],
    [37.832713, 40.197587],
    [37.832649, 40.197611],
    [37.832586, 40.197644],
    [37.832544, 40.197664],
    [37.832495, 40.197694],
    [37.832459, 40.197714],
    [37.832411, 40.197753],
    [37.832378, 40.197780],
    [37.832334, 40.197827],
    [37.832291, 40.197877],
    [37.832257, 40.197921],
    [37.832229, 40.197966],
    [37.832204, 40.198009],
    [37.832178, 40.198060],
    [37.832153, 40.198133],
    [37.832131, 40.198203],
    [37.832111, 40.198288],
    [37.832091, 40.198388],
    [37.832079, 40.198486],
    [37.832069, 40.198574],
    [37.832056, 40.198663],
    [37.832045, 40.198780],
    [37.832032, 40.198870],
    [37.832011, 40.198944],
    [37.831990, 40.199002],
    [37.831960, 40.199054],
    [37.831929, 40.199095],
    [37.831883, 40.199152],
    [37.831839, 40.199197],
    [37.831794, 40.199231],
    [37.831728, 40.199276],
    [37.831633, 40.199321],
    [37.831481, 40.199359],
    [37.831218, 40.199409],
    [37.830888, 40.199480],
    [37.830704, 40.199494],
    [37.830634, 40.199492],
    [37.830573, 40.199483],
    [37.830518, 40.199464],
    [37.830448, 40.199436],
    [37.830392, 40.199409],
    [37.830335, 40.199376],
    [37.830284, 40.199337],
    [37.830246, 40.199298],
    [37.830193, 40.199256],
    [37.830010, 40.199012],
    [37.829831, 40.198749],
    [37.829519, 40.198308],
    [37.829319, 40.198016],
    [37.829111, 40.197743],
    [37.829021, 40.197662],
    [37.828878, 40.197580],
    [37.828720, 40.197491],
    [37.828566, 40.197404],
    [37.828441, 40.197324],
    [37.828339, 40.197250],
    [37.828260, 40.197187],
    [37.828152, 40.197088],
    [37.827860, 40.196818],
    [37.827541, 40.196494],
    [37.827228, 40.196196],
    [37.826898, 40.195867],
    [37.826702, 40.195675],
    [37.826613, 40.195575],
    [37.826531, 40.195443],
    [37.826478, 40.195321],
    [37.826414, 40.195163],
    [37.826348, 40.194890],
    [37.826299, 40.194574],
    [37.826231, 40.194224],
    [37.826177, 40.193904],
    [37.826139, 40.193723],
    [37.826100, 40.193589],
    [37.826026, 40.193459],
    [37.825943, 40.193355],
    [37.825853, 40.193272],
    [37.825775, 40.193209],
    [37.825671, 40.193170],
    [37.825561, 40.193141],
    [37.825458, 40.193127],
    [37.825188, 40.193164],
    [37.824752, 40.193224],
    [37.824634, 40.193247],
    [37.824570, 40.193259],
    [37.824501, 40.193288],
    [37.824420, 40.193338],
    [37.824327, 40.193413],
    [37.824254, 40.193507],
    [37.824193, 40.193606],
    [37.824153, 40.193689],
    [37.824119, 40.193776],
    [37.824083, 40.193944],
    [37.824049, 40.194281],
    [37.823928, 40.195305],
    [37.823911, 40.195493],
    [37.823897, 40.195602],
    [37.823904, 40.195741],
    [37.823923, 40.195866],
    [37.823957, 40.196015],
    [37.824015, 40.196166],
    [37.824070, 40.196270],
    [37.824131, 40.196363],
    [37.824213, 40.196472],
    [37.824375, 40.196609],
    [37.824652, 40.196802],
    [37.824813, 40.196937],
    [37.824939, 40.197046],
    [37.825055, 40.197186],
    [37.825180, 40.197345],
    [37.825288, 40.197497],
    [37.825377, 40.197639],
    [37.825440, 40.197761],
    [37.825510, 40.197914],
    [37.825597, 40.198139],
    [37.825694, 40.198415],
    [37.825792, 40.198686],
    [37.825909, 40.199033],
    [37.826039, 40.199410],
    [37.826164, 40.199763],
    [37.826318, 40.200207],
    [37.826415, 40.200489],
    [37.826473, 40.200642],
    [37.826710, 40.201149],
    [37.826986, 40.201710],
    [37.827309, 40.202362],
    [37.827518, 40.202773],
    [37.827663, 40.203044],
    [37.827758, 40.203187],
    [37.827895, 40.203345],
    [37.828208, 40.203664],
    [37.829055, 40.204521],
    [37.829362, 40.204810],
    [37.829550, 40.204936],
    [37.829963, 40.205153],
    [37.830508, 40.205444],
    [37.831224, 40.205822],
    [37.831743, 40.206099],
    [37.831940, 40.206206],
    [37.832071, 40.206290],
    [37.832170, 40.206373],
    [37.832364, 40.206571],
    [37.832623, 40.206850],
    [37.832920, 40.207177],
    [37.833131, 40.207399],
    [37.833267, 40.207577],
    [37.833332, 40.207677],
    [37.833393, 40.207798],
    [37.833434, 40.207939],
    [37.833455, 40.208082],
    [37.833457, 40.208192],
    [37.833440, 40.208293],
    [37.833421, 40.208401],
    [37.833391, 40.208503],
    [37.833345, 40.208606],
    [37.833302, 40.208680],
    [37.833251, 40.208740],
    [37.833190, 40.208804],
    [37.833099, 40.208883],
    [37.832928, 40.208975],
    [37.832760, 40.209056],
    [37.832636, 40.209124],
    [37.832479, 40.209195],
    [37.832309, 40.209275],
    [37.831800, 40.209529],
    [37.831420, 40.209716],
    [37.831165, 40.209843],
    [37.830959, 40.209925],
    [37.830790, 40.209958],
    [37.830519, 40.209990],
    [37.830184, 40.210031],
    [37.829851, 40.210064],
    [37.829558, 40.210102],
    [37.829321, 40.210127],
    [37.829198, 40.210165],
    [37.829053, 40.210222],
    [37.828914, 40.210311],
    [37.828751, 40.210424],
    [37.828626, 40.210484],
    [37.828524, 40.210518]
  ];
  const canalLine = L.polyline(canalControlPoints, {
    color: '#ffb300',
    weight: 8,
    opacity: 0.3,
    smoothFactor: 1
  }).bindTooltip('Sulama kanalı', { sticky: true });
  categoryLayers.site.addLayer(canalLine);
  zoomTracked.push({ marker: canalLine, minZoom: 13, maxZoom: 22 });

  Object.values(categoryLayers).forEach(g => g.addTo(map));

  // Yer adı etiketleri (marker değil, sadece metin)
  // minZoom/maxZoom opsiyonel — verilmezse her zoom seviyesinde görünür
  // large: true → daha büyük puntoyla göster
  const labels = [
    { lat: 37.920268, lon: 40.196915, text: 'Diyarbakır',            large: true },
    { lat: 37.891316, lon: 40.195971, text: 'Diyarbakır havalimanı', minZoom: 11 },
    { lat: 37.833916, lon: 40.199200, text: 'Tavşantepe',            minZoom: 12 },
    { lat: 37.818829, lon: 40.190692, text: 'Batıkarakoç',           minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.839719, lon: 40.232105, text: 'Çarıklı',               minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.874587, lon: 40.174856, text: 'Ağaçgeçit',             minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.838427, lon: 40.173912, text: 'Sarıdallı',             minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.836359, lon: 40.161209, text: 'Tellikaya',             minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.887217, lon: 40.228050, text: 'Ongözlü köprü',         minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.867470, lon: 40.243692, text: 'Dicle',                 minZoom: 13 },
    { lat: 37.847723, lon: 40.207072, text: 'Eğertutmaz deresi',     minZoom: 16, angle: 10 }
  ];

  labels.forEach(l => {
    const innerHtml = l.angle
      ? '<span style="display:inline-block;transform:rotate(' + l.angle + 'deg)">' + l.text + '</span>'
      : l.text;
    const opts = {
      icon: L.divIcon({
        className: 'site-map-label' + (l.large ? ' site-map-label--large' : ''),
        html: innerHtml,
        iconSize: l.large ? [180, 28] : [120, 24],
        iconAnchor: l.large ? [90, 14] : [60, 12]
      }),
      interactive: false,
      keyboard: false
    };
    if (l.large) opts.pane = 'topLabels';
    const marker = L.marker([l.lat, l.lon], opts).addTo(map);
    zoomTracked.push({ marker, minZoom: l.minZoom ?? 0, maxZoom: l.maxZoom ?? 22 });
  });

  const updateZoomVisibility = () => {
    const z = map.getZoom();
    zoomTracked.forEach(({ marker, minZoom, maxZoom }) => {
      const visible = (z >= minZoom && z <= maxZoom);
      // L.Marker → getElement(); L.Polyline / L.CircleMarker → _path
      const el = (marker.getElement && marker.getElement()) || marker._path;
      const shadow = marker._shadow;
      if (el) el.style.display = visible ? '' : 'none';
      if (shadow) shadow.style.display = visible ? '' : 'none';
    });
  };
  map.on('zoomend', updateZoomVisibility);
  map.on('overlayadd', updateZoomVisibility);
  updateZoomVisibility();

  // "Narin" yolu — Kur'an kursundan ortak çıkış, okul yanında ikiye ayrılma
  const narinLayer = L.layerGroup();
  const narinPathStyle = { color: '#e53935', weight: 4, opacity: 0.7 };

  // Ortak: Kur'an kursu → ayrılma noktası
  L.polyline([
    [37.835643, 40.200317], // Kur'an kursu
    [37.835634, 40.200408],
    [37.835990, 40.200639],
    [37.836092, 40.200754],
    [37.836354, 40.200821],
    [37.836522, 40.200752],
    [37.836630, 40.200631]  // ayrılma noktası
  ], narinPathStyle).addTo(narinLayer);

  // Narin'in dalı
  L.polyline([
    [37.836630, 40.200631],
    [37.836532, 40.200497]
  ], narinPathStyle).addTo(narinLayer);

  // Kuzenlerin dalı
  L.polyline([
    [37.836630, 40.200631],
    [37.836749, 40.200457],
    [37.836952, 40.200092]
  ], narinPathStyle).addTo(narinLayer);

  // Ayrılma noktası — timestamp tooltip
  L.circleMarker([37.836630, 40.200631], {
    radius: 5,
    fillColor: '#fff',
    color: '#e53935',
    weight: 2,
    fillOpacity: 1
  }).bindTooltip('Narin ayrıldı.<br>- 15:15:08 Okul kamerası (+4dk ileride)<br>- 15:11:08 Gerçek zaman', { direction: 'top' }).addTo(narinLayer);

  // Narin'in son görüldüğü nokta — okul kamerası
  L.circleMarker([37.836532, 40.200497], {
    radius: 5,
    fillColor: '#fff',
    color: '#e53935',
    weight: 2,
    fillOpacity: 1
  }).bindTooltip('Narin\'in okul kamerasında görüldüğü son nokta.<br>- 15:15:21 Okul kamerası (+4dk ileride)<br>- 15:11:27 Gerçek zaman', { direction: 'top' }).addTo(narinLayer);

  narinLayer.addTo(map);
  narinLayer.eachLayer(l => zoomTracked.push({ marker: l, minZoom: 17, maxZoom: 22 }));
  updateZoomVisibility();

  map.fitBounds(points.map(p => [p.lat, p.lon]), { padding: [40, 40] });

  L.control.scale({ imperial: false, position: 'bottomright' }).addTo(map);

  L.control.layers(
    {
      'Uydu (Bing)': bing,
      'Uydu (Esri)': esri,
      'Sokak (OSM)': osm
    },
    {
      '<span class="cat-swatch cat-swatch--camera"></span>Kameralar': categoryLayers.camera,
      '<span class="cat-swatch cat-swatch--building"></span>Yapılar': categoryLayers.building,
      '<span class="cat-swatch cat-swatch--site"></span>Konumlar': categoryLayers.site,
      '<span class="cat-swatch cat-swatch--narin"></span>Narin': narinLayer
    },
    { collapsed: true, position: 'bottomright' }
  ).addTo(map);

  // Görüntü tarihi göstergesi (Esri World Imagery Metadata servisi)
  const ImageryDateControl = L.Control.extend({
    options: { position: 'bottomleft' },
    onAdd: function() {
      const el = L.DomUtil.create('div', 'site-map-imagery-date');
      el.title = 'Uydu görüntü tarihi';
      el.innerHTML = '<span class="value">…</span>';
      return el;
    }
  });
  new ImageryDateControl().addTo(map);

  const monthsTR = ['Oca','Şub','Mar','Nis','May','Haz','Tem','Ağu','Eyl','Eki','Kas','Ara'];

  const formatImageryDate = (d) => {
    if (d === null || d === undefined) return null;
    const s = String(d).padStart(8, '0');
    if (s.length < 4) return null;
    const year = s.substring(0, 4);
    if (year < '1990' || year > '2100') return null;
    if (s.length >= 6) {
      const m = parseInt(s.substring(4, 6), 10);
      if (m >= 1 && m <= 12) return monthsTR[m - 1] + ' ' + year;
    }
    return year;
  };

  let imageryDateTimer = null;
  const updateImageryDate = async () => {
    const valueEl = document.querySelector('.site-map-imagery-date .value');
    if (!valueEl) return;
    const c = map.getCenter();
    const z = map.getZoom();
    const params = new URLSearchParams({
      geometry: c.lng + ',' + c.lat,
      geometryType: 'esriGeometryPoint',
      inSR: '4326',
      spatialRel: 'esriSpatialRelIntersects',
      outFields: 'SRC_DATE,SRC_RES,MinMapLevel,MaxMapLevel',
      returnGeometry: 'false',
      f: 'json'
    });
    const url = 'https://services.arcgisonline.com/ArcGIS/rest/services/World_Imagery/MapServer/4/query?' + params;
    try {
      const res = await fetch(url);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status);
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.error) throw new Error(data.error.message || 'API error');
      const features = data.features || [];
      if (features.length === 0) { valueEl.textContent = '—'; return; }
      // Aktif zoom'u kapsayan footprint'i seç; yoksa en yüksek çözünürlüklü
      let best = features.find(f => {
        const a = f.attributes;
        return z >= (a.MinMapLevel ?? 0) && z <= (a.MaxMapLevel ?? 22);
      });
      if (!best) {
        best = features.slice().sort((a, b) =>
          (parseFloat(a.attributes.SRC_RES) || 999) -
          (parseFloat(b.attributes.SRC_RES) || 999)
        )[0];
      }
      valueEl.textContent = formatImageryDate(best.attributes.SRC_DATE) || '—';
    } catch (e) {
      valueEl.textContent = '—';
    }
  };

  map.on('moveend', () => {
    clearTimeout(imageryDateTimer);
    imageryDateTimer = setTimeout(updateImageryDate, 500);
  });
  setTimeout(updateImageryDate, 100);

  // Dev-only: sağ tıkla koordinat al
  if (isDev) {
    map.on('contextmenu', function(e) {
      e.originalEvent.preventDefault();
      const lat = e.latlng.lat;
      const lon = e.latlng.lng;
      const decimal = lat.toFixed(6) + ', ' + lon.toFixed(6);
      const dms = toDMS(lat, 'lat') + ', ' + toDMS(lon, 'lon');
      L.popup()
        .setLatLng(e.latlng)
        .setContent('<b>Koordinat (dev)</b><code style="display:block;margin-top:4px">' + decimal + '</code><code style="display:block">' + dms + '</code>')
        .openOn(map);
      if (navigator.clipboard) {
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(decimal).catch(() => {});
      }
      console.log('[dev-coord]', decimal, '|', dms);
    });
  }
})();
</script>
```
